content.text:
Done. Added `GET /users/:id`:

- Matches `/users/<id>` and looks up the user by id.
- On match, responds `200` with the user JSON and `content-type: application/json`.
- No match falls through to the existing 404 not-found response.

Everything else is unchanged.
